lint.notes: 5 pre-existing warnings (unused vars, unused eslint-disable) — 0 errors. All warnings are in app code, not new test files.

unit.summary: 22 tests across 3 files — auth-service.test.ts (4 tests) + environment-service.test.ts (8 tests) + evaluation-service.test.ts (10 tests)

skipped.test: [mobile] AppHeader — authenticated › shows display name, role badge, and logout button
skipped.reason: INTENTIONAL: test.skip guard activates on narrow viewports (Pixel 5 = 393px). The element has class 'hidden sm:inline' so it is not visible on mobile. The hidden state is correctly tested by the adjacent 'display name hidden on mobile viewport' test which explicitly asserts toBeHidden().

bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed <CardTitle>Sign In</CardTitle> (renders as <div>) to a native <h1> with equivalent Tailwind classes in src/app/page.tsx

bugs_found_and_fixed.page: /candidate (and other pages using text-primary inline links)
bugs_found_and_fixed.detail: Primary color #c4714f on background #e8e5de gives 2.86:1 ratio (needs 4.5:1)
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added --link CSS variable (oklch(0.460 0.115 43) — darker terracotta) in globals.css and updated inline link classes from text-primary to text-link in candidate/page.tsx and exam/page.tsx
Changed badge.tsx destructive variant from 'bg-destructive/10 text-destructive' to 'bg-destructive text-white' — white on #e7000b = 5.32:1 (passes WCAG AA)

coverage: Unauthenticated access to protected APIs → 401 (exam, admin)
POST /api/evaluate requires admin role → 401 for unauthenticated and candidate

new_work.specs/a11y.spec.ts: New file — 4 axe-core full-page accessibility audits covering all page states
new_work.specs/auth-security.spec.ts: Added 7 new security tests covering evaluate endpoint, environments API, and validation event auth
new_work.specs/auth.setup.ts: Added candidate-a11y.json session creation for isolated a11y testing
new_work.specs/app-header.spec.ts: Expanded skip guard comment to document intentional behaviour
new_work.src/app/page.tsx: Fixed: replaced CardTitle (div) with native h1 for page-has-heading-one compliance
new_work.src/app/globals.css: Added --link CSS variable (darker terracotta for accessible inline link color)
new_work.src/app/candidate/page.tsx: Fixed: changed text-primary to text-link on inline nav links
new_work.src/app/exam/page.tsx: Fixed: changed text-primary to text-link on inline nav links
new_work.src/components/ui/badge.tsx: Fixed: changed destructive variant from bg-destructive/10 text-destructive to bg-destructive text-white for WCAG AA contrast
